name: Asian Tuna Salad
instructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the drained tuna, dried cranberries, shredded or finely diced carrot, thinly sliced green onions, chopped fresh cilantro, sesame seeds, ginger powder, ground chile pepper, and kosher salt. Toss gently to distribute all ingredients evenly throughout the mixture.

2. In a separate small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, chile paste, sesame oil, soy sauce, and honey until smooth and well blended. Pour the dressing over the tuna mixture and stir thoroughly to coat all ingredients. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to enjoy.
simpleInstructions:
1. Toss tuna with cranberries, carrot, green onions, cilantro, sesame seeds, ginger, chile, and salt.

2. Whisk together mayo, chile paste, sesame oil, soy sauce, and honey, then fold into the tuna mix and enjoy!
